Event: Celestial Challenge

Sage Bot Item Code: A38


Other locations the gear can be found
Red Dragon
Mystic Dragon
Thunderstorm Generator

Triggers: Once in a while

Applies an electromagnetic charge to the enemy with the least health. Deals 17000 damage over 2,5 sec. When the effect wears off (even if the charge was removed by using an ability or if the enemy was killed), a discharge goes off, stunning all enemies for a short time. Also, it applies charges to 3 more enemies, dealing 17000 damage over 3,5 sec to them. When the charges wear off, they stun all enemies for a short time.

Requirements: 90-100
